match.userMessage:
Eye-level handheld camera holds steady on Scarlett already crouched at the shoreline, laughing warmly as a small wave rushes up and swirls foam around her bare feet. She presses the coral lipstick tube upright into the glistening wet sand beside the broken shell, then eases her weight back slightly on her heels. Gentle ocean breeze stirs loose strands of her hair while sunlight sparkles across the advancing water and reflective sand.

gentle ocean waves lapping shore with soft foam fizz. small wave swishing and foaming onto wet sand, subtle sand shifting under feet.

Single continuous shot, no cuts. Avoid jitter and bent limbs.
